mapper.sql: id, item_id, nft_id, nft_name, serial_number, serial_no, serial_total, nft_address, image_url, animation_url, html_url, model_text, owner_mid, owner_name, owner_avatar_url, owner_tx_hash, owner_tx_time, owner_expire_time, issue_author, issue_issuer, issue_time, issue_number, description, attributes_json, crawl_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bili_nft_item_detail ( item_id, nft_id, nft_name, serial_number, serial_no, serial_total, nft_address, image_url, animation_url, html_url, model_text, owner_mid, owner_name, owner_avatar_url, owner_tx_hash, owner_tx_time, owner_expire_time, issue_author, issue_issuer, issue_time, issue_number, description, attributes_json, crawl_time ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{nftId}, #{nftName}, #{serialNumber}, #{serialNo}, #{serialTotal}, #{nftAddress}, #{imageUrl}, #{animationUrl}, #{htmlUrl}, #{modelText}, #{ownerMid}, #{ownerName}, #{ownerAvatarUrl}, #{ownerTxHash}, #{ownerTxTime}, #{ownerExpireTime}, #{issueAuthor}, #{issueIssuer}, #{issueTime}, #{issueNumber}, #{description}, #{attributesJson}, #{crawlTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE item_id = VALUES(item_id), nft_name = VALUES(nft_name), serial_number = VALUES(serial_number), serial_no = VALUES(serial_no), serial_total = VALUES(serial_total), nft_address = VALUES(nft_address), image_url = VALUES(image_url), animation_url = VALUES(animation_url), html_url = VALUES(html_url), model_text = VALUES(model_text), owner_mid = VALUES(owner_mid), owner_name = VALUES(owner_name), owner_avatar_url = VALUES(owner_avatar_url), owner_tx_hash = VALUES(owner_tx_hash), owner_tx_time = VALUES(owner_tx_time), owner_expire_time = VALUES(owner_expire_time), issue_author = VALUES(issue_author), issue_issuer = VALUES(issue_issuer), issue_time = VALUES(issue_time), issue_number = VALUES(issue_number), description = VALUES(description), attributes_json = VALUES(attributes_json), crawl_time = VALUES(crawl_time)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bili_nft_item_detail WHERE nft_id = #{nftId} LIMIT 1
